episodes.name: Hell Hath No Fury Like a Man Wronged!
episodes.overview: Ready to settle a score, big shot Abhimanyu Nayak arrives in Goa. Back in the past, Shiva’s reunion with his BFF gang ignites the chapter of love, lies and deceit.

episodes.name: Best Served Cold
